notes: Generated in the parent thread using the built-in image generation tool.
Final board follows the existing vertical project character-board layout: three state panels plus lower detail and material panels.

Visual identity preserves Wu Lan as a Blackwolf snowline scout and peripheral liaison: clear upright wolf-bodied anatomy, wolf muzzle, black wolf ears, golden vertical pupils, low black-grey tail, wolf facial tattooing, dark-blue fitted snow-runner clothing, leather guards, bone whistle, short bow, three short javelins, snow claw footgear, and dark-silver wolf-tooth object language.

The locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem was not redesigned. Northern symbol language appears as bonewood, rawhide cord, oath cord, bone whistle, wolf-tooth buckle, and small object tokens rather than a new crest or public badge.
No background Codex thread was created because this was a single-asset direct parent generation.

QC note: the short wolf pelt reads correctly as a scout fur layer rather than a formal cloak, but downstream prompts should keep emphasizing that it ends near the shoulder blades and must not grow into a heavy mantle.
